positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene viewed through a circular keyhole. The foreground features thick, bold outlines of various native leaves and ferns in deep emerald and moss green. The background is a soft-focus, ethereal woodland glow with hints of pastel sapphire blue and pale lavender, suggesting magic and mystery. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing negative space around the keyhole frame for print versatility. Style: Flat graphic illustration, Japanese woodblock print influence, high contrast line art, suitable for screen printing. Lighting: Uniform, even, and bright. Composition: Symmetrical and balanced, designed for apparel printing, with clear, crisp edges and silhouettes.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, poor anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, watermarks, signature, text, lowres, artifacts, grainy, noisy, bad composition, photographic, realistic, logo, watermark
